A.cenaPrompt: Cinematic vertical 9:16 fine-art still, painterly and tender, no title, no book cover frame: a pair of weathered older mother's hands gently cupped together at the bottom of the frame, holding a tiny house with one warmly lit window; behind and above, at blue dusk, a small village of terracotta rooftops with thin chimney smoke between soft green mountains and a quiet river, a few warm lit windows, a low full moon, two or three swallows crossing the sky; generous calm sky; warm terracotta, sand, cream, sage green and dusk-blue palette; the two hands belong to ONE person, identical skin tone and IDENTICAL matching sleeves on both arms; intimate, quietly epic
A.klingPrompt: thin chimney smoke rising and drifting slowly over the terracotta rooftops; the warm window softly flickering and breathing; two or three swallows slowly crossing the blue-dusk sky; a faint shimmer on the quiet river; the cupped hands and the little house stay perfectly still and intact

intro.texto:
Há mulheres que seguram
toda a gente.

falas: A Amparo apanha o filho antes de cada queda há trinta e seis anos.
Este é o ano em que aprende que as mãos também se pousam.
Escrevi este romance de dentro. Hoje é oferta: o livro inteiro, sem pedir nada.
Lê o primeiro capítulo. Vê se te reconheces.

B.cenaPrompt: Cinematic vertical 9:16 fine-art still, intimate close-up, painterly and tender, no title, no book cover frame: a pair of weathered older mother's hands gently cupped together, holding a tiny house with one single warmly lit window glowing softly; shallow depth of field, the dusk village of terracotta rooftops and soft green mountains blurred far behind in warm bokeh, a low full moon; warm terracotta, sand, cream, sage green and dusk-blue palette; the two hands belong to ONE person, identical skin tone and IDENTICAL matching sleeves on both arms; tender, hushed
B.klingPrompt: the single warm window softly flickering and breathing; the faraway village bokeh shimmering gently; a barely-there drift of dusk haze across the background; the cupped hands and the little house stay perfectly still and intact

intro.texto:
Se és a pessoa a quem todos
ligam quando precisam…

…e ninguém liga só para
saber de ti.

falas: As Mãos de Amparo é o meu primeiro romance, e é oferta.
O livro inteiro, sem pedir nada. Começa por um capítulo que lês sem pagar.

fim.cta: um romance para quem carrega de mais · grátis
